arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network manager connection.

connected_device_id.description: The ID of the device that is connected to the network manager connection.

connected_link_id.description: The ID of the link that is connected to the network manager connection.

description.description: A description of the network manager connection.

device_id.description: The ID of the device associated with the network manager connection.

id.description: The unique identifier for the network manager connection.

link_id.description: The ID of the link associated with the network manager connection.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the network manager connection.
